panel.title: Local Bridge
panel.intro.pre: Connect software on your own machine (browser, files, shell) into tianshu. Run the command below on your computer; it starts a small local client that dials in and registers its tools. Only
panel.steps.run: Run it in a terminal on the machine you want to bridge.
panel.steps.appearPost: and the agent can use its tools.
panel.step1.title: Step 1 · Install the bridge (once)
panel.step1.requires: Requires Node.js. Then pick one of the two ways below.
panel.step2.title: Step 2 · Start it
panel.step2.optionAHint: Run this in a terminal (uses your current picks above):
panel.step2.configStep: 2. Copy this config, then click the menu-bar icon → Settings → “Paste from tianshu”:
panel.tokenValid: Token valid until {date}. Refresh this panel to mint a new one; the old command keeps working until it expires.
panel.authDisabled: Auth is disabled on this server — no token needed.
panel.devices.title: Connected devices
panel.devices.empty: No devices connected yet. Run the command above.
